name: ez-money-management
description: ez-money — a local desktop app (Electron) to import Chime statements and track budgets.

scripts.setup: cd desktop && npm install && cd renderer && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,app -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:app: wait-on http://localhost:4200 && cd desktop && npm run build:main && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:4200 npm start
scripts.build: cd desktop/renderer && npm run build && cd .. && npm run build:main
scripts.package: npm run build && cd desktop && npm run package
scripts.package:win: npm run build && cd desktop && npm run package:win
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && cd desktop && npm run package:linux
